GAP-3 preconditions: live vw_* audit + 2 view migrations applied to prod

- All 27 vw_* views parameterise by site_key; one hardcode (channel internal
  classification) fixed via sites-registry domain join, Property output proven
  byte-identical by same-instant EXCEPT diff.
- Visits-to-conversion attribution fix: renamed off colliding version, corrected
  created_at -> started_at (live schema check), applied + recorded.
- Accrual calendar gate waived by user; generalist at 9 human sessions.
